ns0:entry.ns0:title: Daymychen/art-design-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Daymychen/art-design-pro
Language: vue
A Vue 3 admin dashboard template using Vite + TypeScript + Element Plus | vue3 admin | vue-admin — focused on user experience and visual design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Smaug6739/Alexandrie
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Smaug6739/Alexandrie
Language: vue
📚 The open-source, offline-first Notion, Obsidian & Confluence alternative. Advanced Markdown, multi-tenant teams, OIDC/SSO, and local S3 backups. Deploy in one command.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ayangweb/BongoCat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ayangweb/BongoCat
Language: vue
🐱 跨平台互动桌宠 BongoCat，为桌面增添乐趣！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cfw-guide/ios.cfw.guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cfw-guide/ios.cfw.guide
Language: vue
A complete iOS modding guide, from stock to jailbroken.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crmeb/CRMEB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crmeb/CRMEB
Language: vue
🔥CRMEB开源商城免费开源多语言商城系统，Tp6框架商城，系统可商用；包含小程序商城、H5商城、公众号商城、PC商城、App，支持分销、拼团、砍价、秒杀、优惠券、积分、会员等级、小程序直播、页面DIY，前后端分离，方便二开，更有详细使用文档、接口文档、数据字典、二开文档/视频教程，欢迎大家提出宝贵意见和建议

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crmeb/crmeb_java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crmeb/crmeb_java
Language: vue
Java商城 免费 开源 CRMEB商城JAVA版，SpringBoot + Maven + Swagger + Mybatis Plus + Redis + Uniapp +Vue+elementUI 包含移动端、小程序、PC后台、Api接口；有产品、用户、购物车、订单、积分、优惠券、营销、余额、权限、角色、系统设置、组合数据、可拖拉拽的form表单等模块，大量的减少了二开的成本。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastapiadmin/FastapiAdmin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastapiadmin/FastapiAdmin
Language: vue
FastapiAdmin 是一套完全开源的快速开发平台，提供免费使用。它结合了现代、高性能的技术栈，后端采用Fastapi + SQLAlchemy，前端采用基于 vue3 + typescript + vite + pinia + Element-Plus。旨在帮助开发者快速搭建高质量的中后台系统。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: geekgeekrun/geekgeekrun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/geekgeekrun/geekgeekrun
Language: vue
牛人快跑 - GeekGeekRun，求职找工作自动化工具，基于 Puppeteer、Electron。界面友好，简单易用！开源，免费！快速海投、自动开聊、已读不回提醒、职位信息抓取、不合适职位标记、僵尸职位清理；让你即刻变身成为一台冇得感情的求职机器🤖，找工作不内耗。宝宝不用动，妈妈全自动~祝你收获好Offer！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lissy93/dashy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lissy93/dashy
Language: vue
🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: palxiao/poster-design
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/palxiao/poster-design
Language: vue
迅排设计 - 美观且功能强大的图片编辑器、在线海报设计，仿稿定设计，适用于多种场景：海报生成、电商产品图、文章长图、视频/公众号封面等。A beautiful online image designer, suitable for various scenarios like generate posters, making design easier!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/documentation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/documentation
Language: vue
Pterodactyl's documentation is open source! This repository contains the documentation for installing and updating both the panel and the daemon.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qier222/YesPlayMusic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qier222/YesPlayMusic
Language: vue
高颜值的第三方网易云播放器，支持 Windows / macOS / Linux

ns0:entry.ns0:title: requarks/wiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/requarks/wiki
Language: vue
Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
Language: vue
Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux. It also provides a web version that can be deployed via Docker.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
Language: vue
A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zyronon/douyin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zyronon/douyin
Language: vue
Vue3 + Pinia 仿抖音，Vue 在移动端的最佳实践 . Imitate TikTok ，Vue Best practices on Mobile
